calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

John P. Zanghi, Esq., for the JOHN STEWART COMPANY.
Robert Maule sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant LISA COOPER.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1095 Mission Street, Unit #217, San Francisco, CA 94103.
Past-due rent $0.00
Holdover damages $469.15
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $784.15
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 5

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present via its representative Robert Manle.
Attorney John P Zanghi of Zanghi Torres & Arshawsky LLP (415-977-0444) is present for the plaintiff.
Defendant is NOT present.

The settlement conference does not take place and is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JUN-30-2014 remains on calendar.
